summary: PR #2281 decompiled item functions across multiple Pokémon and item files, added or refined item attribute/item-var structs, updated several recovered prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS, and included a reviewer correction about avoiding shared Pokémon ItemVars misuse by creating a dedicated ItemVars union per Pokémon type.

key_files.role: Shared item type definitions updated for Lugia attributes, Dosei field type, Tincle attributes, Kabigon item vars, and WhiteBea vars/attributes; also the site of review feedback about Pokémon ItemVars design.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: itLugiaAttributes adds x14/x18; itDosei_ItemVars xDE0 changes s32 to f32; itTincleAttributes and itKabigon_ItemVars added; itWhiteBea fields adjusted

key_files.role: Decompiled Dosei thrown and damage-dealt logic using item vars, JObj helpers, random table selection, and animation frame speed handling.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_3F14_Logic7_Thrown and it_3F14_Logic7_DmgDealt bodies added

key_files.role: Decompiled Great Fox laser physics state transition when a flag is set.
Decompiled several Kabigon functions and introduced a local Kabigon attributes struct, random effect spawn, blast-zone check, and item-var use.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_802C9D40, itKabigon_UnkMotion0_Anim, it_802CA3F4 bodies added; pokemon item-var accesses replaced with kabigon item-var accesses
diff_excerpt: it_802CA074 changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void it_802CA074(Item_GObj* gobj)

key_files.role: Decompiled Lugia motion physics using attributes, velocity clamp, and follow-up state function.
Updated recovered prototype and added extern float used by Lugia physics.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_802D1A44 prototype updated; extern f32 it_804DD450 added

key_files.role: Minor include and float-literal formatting changes in PK Flash spawn setup.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ftKirby/ftKb_Init.h include added; 0.0f changed to 0.0F

key_files.role: Float suffix normalization in PK Thunder trail spawning/physics.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: 0.0f/2.0f/1.0f changed to uppercase F literals

key_files.role: Named parameters in recovered prototype for it_802AC43C.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_802AC43C parameters named gobj, ball, pos, trail_idx, arg4, facing_dir

key_files.role: Decompiled yoyo animation setup and cleanup/destruction helper; uses included yoyo attributes, JObj animation calls, link traversal, and PAD_STACK.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_802BE5D8 and it_802BE958 bodies added

key_files.role: Decompiled Old Ottosea collision callback with PAD_STACK and velocity-dependent transition.
Decompiled Patapata state helper using a switch on item var state and facing direction inversion.

evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_802E0D9C changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void it_802E0D9C(Item_GObj* gobj)

key_files.role: Decompiled setup helper for Pikachu thunder jolt air item and added required includes.

evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_802B43D0 changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void it_802B43D0(Item_GObj* gobj, HSD_GObj* arg1)

key_files.role: Decompiled Tincle motion/collision functions and used newly added Tincle attributes.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: itTincle_UnkMotion4_Phys body begins with itTincleAttributes* sa and velocity handling

key_files.role: Largest item-source change in the PR; decompiled multiple WhiteBea functions according to PR metadata and bot match report.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists it_2725_Logic9_Dropped, it_802E3DA0, it_802E4464 as new 100% matches and itWhitebea_UnkMotion1_Anim as an improvement

key_files.role: Small type-surface change associated with item decompilation.

what_changed: Replaced multiple item function stubs or decomp markers with C bodies across Dosei, Great Fox Laser, Kabigon, Lugia, Ness PK Thunder Trail/PK Flash/Yoyo, Old Ottosea, Patapata, Pikachu Thunder Jolt Air, Tincle, and WhiteBea evidence paths.
Added or refined item-specific structs and fields in itCommonItems.h, including itKabigon_ItemVars and itTincleAttributes, Lugia attribute fields, Dosei xDE0 type, and WhiteBea item vars/attributes.
Updated several headers to replace UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with concrete signatures for recovered functions.
Added includes needed by recovered functions, including baselib random/gobjplink, stage, effects, debug, item, and Ness/Kirby fighter headers in touched files.

PR body claims ninja, ninja diff, and all functions 100% objdiff; the bot report records 14 new 100% matches plus 7 improvements at an intermediate point, including some functions below 100% in that report.

smart_moves.text: The PR moved Kabigon state storage from a shared pokemon item-var access to a dedicated kabigon item-var arm in the diff shown after review.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_802CA014 changes ip->xDD4_itemVar.pokemon.xE44_s32 to ip->xDD4_itemVar.kabigon.xE44
review_comments: create a new ItemVars union for each type of Pokémon

smart_moves.text: Recovered function bodies were paired with header prototype cleanup where the body established argument and return types.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: itkabigon.h, itlugia.h, itpatapata.h, itpikachutjoltair.h prototype updates

smart_moves.text: Item attribute structs were introduced or expanded to express specialAttributes field access rather than leaving all accesses as raw offsets in the shown code.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: local itKabigonAttributes struct; itTincleAttributes added; itLugiaAttributes expanded; itWhiteBeaAttributes adjusted

decomp_lessons.lesson: For Pokémon item decompilation, avoid reusing a broad shared Pokémon ItemVars layout when a specific Pokémon needs different field meanings; introduce the appropriate item-specific union arm instead.
evidence_refs: review_comments: This is wrong; create a new `ItemVars` union for each type of Pokémon.
diff_excerpt: itKabigon_ItemVars added and Kabigon code uses ip->xDD4_itemVar.kabigon

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a decompiled function proves a concrete signature, update the owning header from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to the recovered signature in the same PR slice.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_802CA074, it_802D1A44, it_802E0D9C, and it_802B43D0 prototype updates

decomp_lessons.lesson: Item specialAttributes accesses can often be made reviewable by adding a narrow attributes struct for the item and assigning fields into item vars before behavior code uses them.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: itKabigonAttributes local typedef and assignments in it_802C9D40
diff_excerpt: itTincleAttributes added and used in itTincle_UnkMotion4_Phys excerpt

naming_conventions.convention: Recovered item callbacks retain existing address-style or subsystem-style names when semantic names are not proven, e.g. it_802C9D40, it_802CA3F4, it_802B43D0, while known item motion names use existing UnkMotion naming.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: multiple recovered functions keep address-style names or existing UnkMotion names

naming_conventions.convention: Local variables use common short decomp roles such as gobj, ip, jobj, attrs/attr/sa, pos, and r.
Header prototype parameters were named when the role was clear, as in it_802AC43C(Fighter_GObj* gobj, Item_GObj* ball, Vec3* pos, s32 trail_idx, s32 arg4, f32 facing_dir).

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used item-specific union arms and typed attribute structs to recover field accesses in item code.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: itKabigon_ItemVars; itKabigonAttributes; itTincleAttributes; itLugiaAttributes changes
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Reviewer feedback indicates at least one earlier shared Pokémon union approach was wrong; do not generalize shared Pokémon field unions without per-item evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Kept narrow PAD_STACK(8) uses in two recovered functions shown in the diff.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Loaded evidence includes PR/body verification claims but does not include per-function objdiff output for why PAD_STACK was necessary.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used existing project helpers/macros such as GET_ITEM, HSD_JObjGetChild, HSD_JObjClearFlagsAll, HSD_JObjSetScaleZ, HSD_Randi/HSD_Randf, Item_80268E5C, and efSync_Spawn in recovered item logic.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: itdosei.c, itgreatfoxlaser.c, itkabigon.c, itlugia.c, itnesspkthundertrail.c
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The slice does not show alternate attempts or detailed matching rationale for these choices.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Float literal suffix changes to uppercase F appeared in Ness PK Flash/PK Thunder Trail files.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: itnesspkflush.c and itnesspkthundertrail.c literal changes
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The slice does not prove whether these were required for matching or style-only cleanup.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.comment: This is wrong; create a new `ItemVars` union for each type of Pokémon.
review_feedback.intake_note: Strong evidence for a reusable review lesson about per-Pokémon item-var union arms; do not infer more reviewer intent than the comment states.

follow_up_queries: PR 2281 ribbanya ItemVars union each type of Pokémon

evidence_refs: diff_excerpt/raw_diff: large diff excerpt truncated before full Tincle/WhiteBea details
notes: Changed-file metadata is complete for 19 files, but the raw diff and displayed diff excerpt are truncated, so details for later portions, especially full Tincle and WhiteBea edits, are incomplete in the loaded slice.

PR body claims all functions are 100% matches in objdiff, while the loaded bot report shows 14 new 100% matches and 7 improvements, including several functions below 100% at that report time. Treat final validation as claimed by PR body, with intermediate report caveat.
Only one review comment is loaded; no evidence is available for final reviewer acceptance rationale beyond merge metadata and review records.
PAD_STACK uses are visible, but the loaded evidence does not include narrow objdiff snippets explaining their necessity.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use per-Pokémon ItemVars union arms instead of overloading a shared Pokémon item-var layout
accepted_candidate_records.text: In item decompilation, when different Pokémon item kinds need distinct item-var field meanings, create a dedicated ItemVars union arm for that Pokémon rather than adding broad unions to a shared Pokémon layout. PR #2281 shows reviewer feedback rejecting shared Pokémon ItemVars overloading and the diff shows Kabigon moved to ip->xDD4_itemVar.kabigon.
evidence_refs: review_comments: ribbanya says create a new ItemVars union for each type of Pokémon
diff_excerpt: it_802CA014 changes pokemon.xE44_s32 to kabigon.xE44

accepted_candidate_records.title: Pair recovered item bodies with header prototype cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: When an item function body recovers the concrete return type and parameter types, update the corresponding item header signature rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify item-var union specificity for Pokémon items
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding an item-subsystem note under typed-fields-over-pointer-math: for Pokémon item decompilation, do not overload a shared Pokémon ItemVars layout with unions for one Pokémon's fields; create/use the specific Pokémon ItemVars union arm when evidence shows per-type field meanings.
evidence_refs: review_comments: This is wrong; create a new `ItemVars` union for each type of Pokémon.
source_update_candidates.reason: The reviewer feedback is direct and reusable, but promotion to a global standard should be curator-owned.

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/it/itCommonItems.h owns shared item attribute and ItemVars layouts
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2281 modifies src/melee/it/itCommonItems.h for item attribute structs and item-var layout arms used by item source files, including Lugia, Dosei, Tincle, Kabigon, and WhiteBea.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: multiple struct and ItemVars edits
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scope fact, but should be checked against current repository ownership before adding to path facts.

rejection_notes: Do not record PR #2281 as proof that all 24 functions were independently verified in the loaded evidence; the PR body claims this, but the loaded bot report is intermediate and lists 14 new matches plus 7 improvements.
Do not generalize PAD_STACK use from this PR as normal style; visible uses lack per-function verifier rationale in the loaded slice.
Do not infer semantic names for address-style symbols such as it_802C9D40, it_802CA3F4, or it_802B43D0 beyond the existing names in the diff.
